message.content:
@startuml
title 
end title
autonumber "<b>" 1 "." "{0}"


box "IntegrationTest" #LightBlue2
participant IntegrationTest as test
end box

box "" #WhiteSmoke
    participant Spring Application as app
    
    note right of De /nSerializer : Continues through\nnext Diagram
    boundary serializer as serDe 
    
    control ctrl:AddMemberToGroupController as controller
    entity AddMemberRequestAssembler as assemblerReqDTOs
    object requestDTO: \nAddMemberRequestDTO
    entity AddMemberResponse DTOAssembler as assemblerRespDTOs
    group Resp Group Response DTO
        object groupRespDTO:\nGroupResponseDTO
        
    
        
    endgroup
    
    
    



boundary srv:AddMember ToGroupService as service 

note bottom of infoDto :\ninfo:AddMember RequestInfoDTO
object infoDto 


@enduml
